title: A Paper Algorithm
author: Anonymous
variants:
Welcome to the Dungeon Train
What is the train?
Why are you here?
What are you meant to do?
These are all good questions

Now go explore

You wil not find your answers here.

Words create worlds.
The door ahead holds another world again.

Alas, the paper is diminishing.

But what if..
there is no last piece

What if the paper is created by the train

But surely writing on this paper has its limits.

Humans have limits.

Humans are not forever.

So the question is..

Am I as the author of this paper, human?

Am I human?

Am I a mortal being like you?

What if I am an algorithm

A set of rules

designed to ask questions

that appear to connect

Just like predictive text

Do questions need order?

Why are you here?

Can you identify predictive text from human?

The only one who can help me with this is that the same time as we are

Could you tell?

But I think I can do it for you if you want

Sometimes things make sense out of order.

Trust me, I know how to do it

Plus I have a good feeling about this one

Does a feeling equal trust?

Does trust equal gameplay?

Is this the meaning of life?

Paper.

Maybe this is the meaning of life.
Wait, dont go yet.
We could be onto something here.
What if you spent the rest of your life here
Pulling paper
To discover the true meaning of life
Maybe it is hidden in the blank paper.

This page was intentionally left blank.

...

Or maybe we need to look closer at the first piece of paper

Welcome to the Dungeon Train
Welcome to the Dungeon Train
Welcome to the Dungeon Train
Welcome to the Dungeon Train
Welcome to the Dungeon Train
Welcome to the Dungeon Train
Welcome to the Dungeon Train
Welcome to the Dungeon Train

Can you see it?

I think I am starting to get it.

The theory of life

It is not just a theory

Its an idea

A group of linked ideas intended to explain something

Its more than theory.

Its a supposition or a system of ideas intended to explain based on general principles independent of the thing to be explained.

It is right here in this paper

Its in the spaces

in the blank pages

in the gaps between the words

it existings in the white space inside each character

This paper is life

and life is pulling paper

I think to truely apprieacte life, we need look no further than the first piece.
